**Visual Mockup Description**:

- Six cards arranged in responsive grid
- Each card features a unique animated geometric form
- Color coding: Warm (nurturing) → Cool (challenging)
- Subtle parallax on scroll/swipe
- Selection triggers immediate shape transformation preview
